---
title: Persistent Agent Memory — Giving Claude Cross-Machine Context with Symlinks
  and Git
author: Chris Kornaros
date: 2026-06-07
categories:
- blog
- guide
- ai
published: '2026-06-07'
---

```{=html}
<div class="substack-post-embed"><p lang="en">Persistent Agent Memory — Giving Claude Cross-Machine Context with Symlinks and Git by Chris Kornaros</p><p></p><a data-post-link href="https://chriskornaros.substack.com/p/persistent-agent-memory">Read on Substack</a></div><script async src="https://substack.com/embedjs/embed.js" charset="utf-8"></script>
```
